name: POS Profile-posa_return_validity_days
label: Return Validity Days
description: Default number of days after posting date when returns stay valid for this profile.

name: POS Profile-posa_enable_return_validity
label: Enable Return Validity
description: Enable return validity enforcement for this POS Profile.

name: POS Profile-posa_show_custom_name_marker_on_print
label: Show Custom Name Marker On Print

name: POS Profile-posa_force_reload_items
label: Force Reload Items
description: Reload price list Rate from server when customer changes

name: POS Profile-posa_search_limit
label: Search Limit Number
description:
Search Limit for Items
For best performance keep this under 1500

name: POS Profile-posa_server_cache_duration
label: Server Cache Duration
description: Cache the values for n minutes

name: POS Profile-posa_use_server_cache
label: Use Server Cache
description: Use Redis cache on the server to speedup initial loads of POS Awesome

name: POS Profile-posa_allow_submissions_in_background_job
label: Allow Submissions in background job
description: Send invoice to submit after printing

name: POS Profile-posa_new_line
label: Allow add New Items on New Line

name: POS Profile-posa_allow_user_to_edit_item_discount
label: Allow User to Edit Item Discount

name: POS Profile-posa_show_customer_balance
label: Show Customer Balance
description: Display customer balance in POS screen

name: POS Profile-posa_camera_scan_type
label: Camera Scan Type
description: Select which types of codes to scan with camera

name: POS Profile-posa_enable_camera_scanning
label: Enable Camera Scanning
description: Enable camera-based barcode and QR code scanning for mobile devices

name: POS Profile-posa_allow_user_to_edit_additional_discount
label: Allow user to edit Additional Discount

name: POS Profile-posa_cash_mode_of_payment
label: Cash Mode of Payment
description: For POS Closing Shift Payment Reconciliation

name: POS Profile-posa_force_price_from_customer_price_list
label: Force Price from Customer Price List
description: Force items to use the customer's price list. Items without a price will show zero.

name: POS Profile-create_pos_invoice_instead_of_sales_invoice
label: Create POS Invoice instead of Sales Invoice
